entries.definition: a violent confrontation or conflict between people or groups
entries.exampleSentence: Several people were injured in violent clashes between protesters and police.

entries.definition: a serious disagreement or incompatibility of ideas, opinions, or interests
entries.exampleSentence: There was a clash of personalities between the two managers that made teamwork impossible.

entries.definition: a loud, jarring sound made by metal objects hitting each other
entries.exampleSentence: The clash of cymbals marked the climax of the symphony.

entries.definition: to come into violent conflict; to be incompatible; to make a loud jarring sound
entries.exampleSentence: That red tie clashes horribly with your orange shirt.
